cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 5% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.53% · Gold -0.33% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 5% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at -1.44%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.44%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -9.03%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.18% at $126.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
